rules.rule_text:
rule unknown_creds_dump
{
	meta:
		author = "@patrickrolsen"
		reference = "Misc. Creds Dump"
		filetype = "EXE"
		version = "0.1"
		date = "1/30/2014"

	strings:
		$s1 = "OpenProcessToken:%d"
		$s2 = "LookupPrivilegeValue:%d"
		$s3 = "AdjustTokenPrivilege:%d"
		$s4 = "\\GetPassword\\"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and ( all of ( $s* ) )
}
